applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.text: 员工应在费用发生后60天内提交报销申请;超过期限的,原则上不得报销。
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: All expense records are from 2025, within this policy's effective period

applicable_clauses.text: 会计年度末发生的费用,最迟可在财政年度结束后15天内补充提交,逾期按超期报销处理。
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: December expenses have a specific year-end deadline of Jan 15 instead of the 60-day rule

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed by Article 14 of 2025 version, effective 2025-01-01. All audited records are from 2025.

version_relationship: 2025 version replaces 2022 version as of 2025-01-01 per Article 14
